final:
module sd_card_controller(
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [3:0] command,
    output reg obf_ack
);
    
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            obf_ack <= 0;
        end else begin
            if (command != 4'b0000) begin // Assuming 0000 is an invalid command
                obf_ack <= 1;
            end else begin
                obf_ack <= 0;
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
